---
title: "Vision Transformers"
description: "From attention mechanisms to ViT, DETR, and SegFormer — implemented from scratch in PyTorch."
date: "2026-02-15"
categories: [ViT, Transformers, PyTorch]
---

A hands-on study of Vision Transformers, progressing from foundational attention mechanisms to state-of-the-art architectures for classification, detection, and segmentation.

**Repository:** [digital-nomad-cheng/vit](https://github.com/digital-nomad-cheng/vit)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A["01 Attention"] --> B["02 ViT"]
    B --> C["03 DETR"]
    B --> D["04 SegFormer"]

    style A fill:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style B fill:#7b61ff,color:#fff
    style C fill:#e06c75,color:#fff
    style D fill:#56b6c2,color:#fff
```

## Sub-projects

### 01 — Transformer Attention

Core multi-head self-attention and positional encoding, implemented from scratch in a Jupyter notebook. Covers the building blocks that power all subsequent projects.

🔗 [View code](https://github.com/digital-nomad-cheng/vit/blob/main/01_transformer_attention.ipynb)

### 02 — ViT on CIFAR-10

Vision Transformer (ViT) image classification on CIFAR-10. Also includes a Transformer-in-Transformer (TNT) variant trained on MNIST, exploring nested tokenisation at both patch and pixel levels.

🔗 [View code](https://github.com/digital-nomad-cheng/vit/tree/main/02_vit_cifar10)

### 03 — DETR on VisDrone

DEtection TRansformer (DETR) fine-tuned for aerial object detection on the VisDrone dataset. The architecture was rewritten to exactly match the official Facebook DETR implementation, enabling direct loading of pretrained weights and head-only fine-tuning for faster convergence.

🔗 [View code](https://github.com/digital-nomad-cheng/vit/tree/main/03_detr_visdrone)

### 04 — SegFormer on ADE20K

SegFormer B0 semantic segmentation on ADE20K. Combines hierarchical Transformer encoders with lightweight MLP decoders for efficient dense prediction.

🔗 [View code](https://github.com/digital-nomad-cheng/vit/tree/main/04_segformer_ade20k)

## References

| Paper | Year | Sub-project |
|---|---|---|
| [Attention Is All You Need](https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762) (Vaswani et al.) | 2017 | 01 |
| [An Image is Worth 16x16 Words](https://arxiv.org/abs/2010.11929) (Dosovitskiy et al.) | 2020 | 02 |
| [Transformer in Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2103.00112) (Han et al.) | 2021 | 02 |
| [End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.12872) (Carion et al.) | 2020 | 03 |
| [SegFormer: Simple and Efficient Design for Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.15203) (Xie et al.) | 2021 | 04 |

## Tech Stack

Python · PyTorch · uv ·
